title: Boss Arena Phase Keyframes
description: Capture a boss encounter through phase-based arena keyframes so the space, mechanics, and escalation are readable before the player ever fights it.

en.title: Boss Arena Phase Keyframes
en.description: Capture a boss encounter through phase-based arena keyframes so the space, mechanics, and escalation are readable before the player ever fights it.

zh-CN.title: Boss 场地阶段关键帧
zh-CN.description: 围绕一场 Boss 战做阶段关键帧，要求 arena 结构、机制变化和压迫感都能被读出来。
